description: A calm chibi shinobi pet inspired by Itachi, with black hair, forehead protector, red-eyed focus, and a black cloak with red cloud motifs. Hover can trigger a one-shot Amaterasu transformation.

amaterasu.description: Sharingan opens, a red-black eye circle expands outward, then Amaterasu starts from the eye, wraps the body, Itachi disappears, and the flame-only state holds for about 2-3 seconds.
